description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in a distinctive uniform featuring a fitted long-sleeve top with a high collar and a diagonal color-blocked design, paired with matching trousers. The top has a badge or insignia on the left chest, suggesting an affiliation with an organization or rank. The trousers are tucked into mid-calf boots with a structured, utilitarian appearance. The figure is bald and has a neutral facial expression, with hands relaxed at the sides. The uniform is form-fitting and appears to be made from a synthetic or blended fabric, giving it a slightly structured look. The overall appearance is clean, professional, and reminiscent of a science fiction or futuristic setting.
description: An adult male in a fitted, professional uniform with a high-collared top, insignia, and mid-calf boots, standing upright with a neutral expression.
description_view_0: Front view showing the uniform's high collar, insignia on the left chest, and the figure's facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, the fitted nature of the uniform, and the boots.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the uniform, the bald head, and the structured fit of the trousers and boots.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the figure's profile, arm position, and the side seam of the uniform.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted uniform with high-collared long-sleeve top, insignia, and structured trousers
